control_card.F: A valid summary must keep all support flags true and the merged frame count fixed.
control_card.G: This checker validates bookkeeping only and does not promote a theorem.
control_card.L: read summary json -> validate support flags and scalar thresholds -> emit deterministic JSON
control_card.O: Owner 5 validates the sharp conditional TheoremG summary contract.
control_card.R: Require the CSV-backed summary to preserve positive H_area/H_B support, delta1 > 1, and a positive exponent margin.
control_card.S: Fail closed on missing keys, failed support flags, non-positive delta1, or non-positive exponent gap.
